articles.title: Ethereum’s ‘capitulation’ suggests ETH price is undervalued: Fidelity report
articles.description: Key Takeaways: Fidelity Digital Assets’ report said that multiple Ethereum onchain metrics suggest ETH trades at a discount. The BTC/ETH market cap ratio is at mid-2020 levels. Ethereum's layer-2 active addresses hit new highs at 13. 6 million

articles.title: Base reaches ‘stage 1’ in Ethereum rollup decentralization with fault proofs and security council
articles.description: Base has advanced to Stage 1 in Vitalik Buterin’s rollup decentralization model, lowering its dependence on centralized entities.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin- and StarkWare-backed Kakarot reveals alternative Ethereum ZK stack, targeting real-time STARK proofs on Layer 1 by end of 2025
articles.description: Kakarot expects to begin proving Ethereum Layer 1 blocks in real-time by the end of 2025, using an independent ZK stack powered by ZK-STARKs.

articles.title: Ethereum price has several reasons to break $2,000 next
articles.description: Key takeaways:Strong Ethereum ETF inflows signal high institutional demand. Ethereum’s $51. 8B TVL and 30% DEX weekly volume rise show robust network strength. A bull flag pattern on the ETH’s four-hour chart targets $2,100

articles.title: Tornado Cash is safe from US sanctions, says court
articles.description: The Texas court rejected the Treasury's arguments and ruled that it can longer sanction the crypto mixer accused of laundering Lazarus funds.

articles.title: Trump’s First 100 Days: The Impact on Crypto
articles.description: Pardons, tariffs and strategic Bitcoin reserves — Trump's first 100 days have been hugely consequential for crypto.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation Reveals New Leadership Structure and 12-Month Roadmap
articles.description: This marks a rare and valuable update into the internal mechanics of the organization behind one of crypto’s most influential […] The post Ethereum Foundation Reveals New Leadership Structure and 12-Month Roadmap appeared first on Coindoo.
